content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/create_notion.py", "summary": "This file contains logic to create Notion pages for each task (dev tasks and unit test tasks) in a sprint board database. It handles error logging and ensures that the creation of one failing page does not abort the rest.", "rules": [{"name": "Create Notion Pages", "description": "For each approved story, generate context blocks and specific task blocks based on the type of task (dev or unit test). Use these to create a new Notion page with specified properties and blocks.", "conditions": ["approved_stories in state", "ppm_number in state", "ppm_name in state", "system_name in state"], "actions": ["create context blocks for each story", "generate task-specific blocks based on task type", "create Notion pages using the generated blocks and properties"]}], "dependencies": ["config.settings", "pipeline.state.StoryForgeState", "notion_export.client.get_notion_export_client"]}
